name: Personal Terminal
description: Your personal computer terminal. A scratched screen glows softly.

name: Navigation Terminal
description: The ship's navigation terminal. Charts, waypoints and flight data.

name: Storage Terminal
description: An inventory management terminal for tracking ship cargo and stores.

name: Medical Terminal
description: Medical records, diagnostics and treatment logs.

name: Personal Locker
description: Your personal locker with twin sliding doors, built into the far wall.
open_description: The cabinet doors slide open smoothly, revealing racks for clothing and several shelves.

name: Small Cabinet
open_description: The door swings open to reveal several shelves.

name: Large Storage Unit
description: A large wall-mounted storage unit with heavy-duty shelving.
open_description: The door swings open to reveal several shelves and parts bins.

name: Tool Storage Cabinet
description: A professional-grade cabinet for organising hand tools and diagnostic equipment.
open_description: Drawers slide out smoothly on ball-bearing runners, displaying precision-cut foam inserts.

name: Large Parts Storage Unit
description: A large wall-mounted parts storage cabinet for spare components and hardware.
open_description: The door swings open to reveal several shelves and parts bins.

name: EVA Equipment Locker
description: Dedicated storage for EVA gear with padded hangers and accessory bins.
open_description: The tall door opens to reveal a full-length suit rack and accessory bins.

name: Large Cabinet
description: A large wall-mounted cabinet for general cargo storage.
open_description: The door swings open to reveal several shelves.
